rule: an unprefixed attribute is in no namespace and does not visibly utilize the default namespace, so xmlns= is still pruned when the element itself is prefixed
provenance: derived from W3C Exclusive XML Canonicalization 1.0 REC (xml-exc-c14n-20020718) §2 visibly-utilized rule (unprefixed attributes do not utilize the default declaration); expected output computed by hand from the spec rule, not from a third-party tool.
